updates.heading: Hiring Acceleration Week — Results (June 23–27)
bullets: R&D Invite's inaugural Hiring Acceleration Week focused on sourcing velocity, SLA cleanup, and candidate experience
GEM: 371 prospects added, 296 contacted (80%), 82 replies (22%), 21 converted (6%)
Tag: GEM project #summersplash2025; GH tag #summersplash2025 for converted candidates

updates.heading: Q1 R&D Metrics Snapshot (as of late July)
bullets: OA: 84 with 8 open offers | Target: 96
App to OA: 57 days | Target: 60 days
8 business days left in Q1 as of July 22 — push to close strong

updates.heading: Internal Recruiter Fills — Khetsun Tenzin & Mike Galligan (Roberto's team)
bullets: Two FTE Recruiter roles on Roberto Segovia's Eng team filled internally
Process was internal-only, 5 business days open; both candidates are high performers already on the team

updates.heading: R&D Exec Reporting Dashboard — Kebone Building
bullets: Kebone taking lead on building a shared R&D reporting dashboard to replace manual exec update doc
Will cover Eng, PM, and Design pods; framework to be socialized with Jaime, Roberto, and Todd

updates.heading: Equitability Consultant — Rachel Bonds Intro (Action: Schedule 30 min)
bullets: Invite is working with Rachel Bonds (external consultant) to improve equitability in recruiting processes
Todd asked Kebone and Jaime to schedule via Calendly at their earliest convenience

updates.heading: Candidate Fraud / Propaganda Resumes — Watch Out
bullets: Multiple R&D recruiters flagging fraudulent profiles and resumes with potential propaganda
Todd noted guidance in progress — watch for updates on flagging and managing process

updates.heading: FY27 Q1 R&D Headcount — 19 Roles to Close
bullets: Brandon Lassoff confirmed 19 open roles to close as part of FY27 Q1 R&D Headcount Exercise
Tracker shared with Kristin and Kebone — status updates needed in column G
